scripts.build: npm run prepare:content && ASTRO_TELEMETRY_DISABLED=1 astro build
scripts.dev: npm run prepare:content && ASTRO_TELEMETRY_DISABLED=1 astro dev
scripts.test: npm run prepare:content && node scripts/test-url-coverage.mjs && node scripts/audit-redirects.mjs && node scripts/audit-static-migration.mjs && node scripts/audit-converted-html.mjs && node scripts/audit-visible-artifacts.mjs && node scripts/audit-content-fidelity.mjs && node scripts/audit-internal-links.mjs && node scripts/audit-external-references.mjs && node scripts/report-url-gaps.mjs
